behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names all asserted paths (src/js/internal/sql/shared.ts, sqlite.ts, mysql.ts, postgres.ts, test/CLAUDE.md), the required import pattern 'require("internal/sql/shared")', and the destructured names 'definedColumns' and 'columnsSql'.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug and required behavior/API surface but does not dictate specific line edits or internal helper implementations.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests require the exact destructured names 'definedColumns' and 'columnsSql' and import string 'internal/sql/shared', which are gold-specific naming choices; a semantically equivalent alternative using different names would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests extract the function body and execute it in a JS runner (_build_behavioral_test_script), and run oxlint/prettier subprocesses.

test_not_tautological.reason: Behavioral tests 1-6 assert on actual filtering behavior (e.g., T3 requires column kept when only second item defined), which a stub returning empty/default would fail.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover single-object filtering, bulk insert data-loss fix, all-undefined exclusion, SQL format with parentheses/VALUES, and three-adapter wiring plus CLAUDE.md docs.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass) and named descriptively (test_repo_oxlint, test_syntax_check, etc.).

structured_data_schema.reason: No structured data output; task modifies TS source.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers match between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction identifies the files to modify but does not name specific buggy lines; localization within files is left to the agent.
